SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JANE MARTIN, OWNER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, JANE SHIFT DESIGN STUDIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAND, JEFF $632.40 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $722.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
